about.title: About
about.text: Software Engineer with 3+ years building cloud-native systems on GCP, microservices, and data-oriented pipelines. Experienced integrating machine learning models into production environments and working with geospatial and image-based datasets. Seeking backend, cloud, and AI systems roles.
